opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My throat feels incredibly tight, like someone is choking me. I can feel a lump there and I'm terrified it's suddenly growing and cutting off my air.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on over the last couple of hours and I'm panicking that my thyroid is swelling and blocking my breathing.

symptom_narrative.character: tight, lump-in-throat sensation, difficulty swallowing saliva
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: since I started worrying and pressing on my neck
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: pressing on my neck, focusing on it
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: can still breathe and talk normally, no noisy breathing, can drink water; breathing fast from panic
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get anxious about the thyroid lump

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a mild thyroid lump/goitre with antibodies, thyroid works normally

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: has been palpating the neck repeatedly

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants to be told her airway isn't closing

objective_data_offered.value: I can speak in full sentences and drink water; my breathing isn't noisy or whistling
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-report over video; reassuring for airway patency but not a formal airway assessment
